sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56371" key="*kedrea=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κεδρεᾶτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κέδρος</etym>) title of Artemis at Orchomenus in Ar- cadia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:13:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.13.2</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
